title: EATF AEP v1 metadata.json
description: Validates the metadata.json entry inside an AEP v1 evidence package. Wire format documented in docs/aep-profile.md. The signature, timestamp, and OVERT receipt are validated by the verifier separately; this schema only constrains metadata.json.

schema.description: Schema identifier URN. Optional in v0.1 for backwards compatibility with sparse early metadata payloads; when present MUST equal 'urn:eatf:spec:aep:metadata:1.0'.

attestation_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this attestation. Producers are encouraged to use a ULID, UUIDv7, or another monotonically-sortable scheme.

tenant_id_hash.description: SHA-256 hex of the deployment-local tenant identifier; or all-zeros for fixtures. Optional.

agent_id.description: URN identifier of the agent producing the attestation. Conventional form: urn:eatf:tenant:<tenant>:agent:<slug>.

action_type.description: Free-form classifier of the action being attested, e.g. 'mcp.tools/call:github.create_issue' or 'foundational:llm-response'.

model.description: Identifier of the model that produced the underlying response (when applicable).

policy_id.description: Identifier of the policy under which the action was evaluated.

policy_coverage.description: Fraction of policy rules that successfully evaluated (1.0 means full coverage).

policy_decision.description: Policy outcome for the recorded action.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp asserting when the producer sealed the package. The trusted timestamp in timestamp.tsr is authoritative; this field is informational.

privacy_mode.description: Whether the underlying response is included verbatim (false) or only its hash (true).

mcp.description: Optional MCP-specific block for tools/call attestations.
